title.en: Join FerryBox data with station/river data (daily) by parameter

description.en: Reads two CSV files, filters to one station ID in the second dataset, aggregates both datasets to daily means, and joins by year/month/day. Outputs a CSV.

links.title: GitHub repo of NIVA AquaINFRA tools

data_x_csv.title: data_x_csv
data_x_csv.description: Path (inside container mount) or URL to the first CSV (FerryBox-style transect). Must include latitude, longitude, value, parameter, and a time column.

data_y_csv.title: data_y_csv
data_y_csv.description: Path (inside container mount) or URL to the second CSV (station/river). Must include value, parameter, a time column, and station column.

parameter_x.title: parameter_x
parameter_x.description: Parameter name to use from the first dataframe (data_x).

parameter_y.title: parameter_y
parameter_y.description: Parameter name to use from the second dataframe (data_y).

station_col.title: station_col
station_col.description: Column name in data_y that identifies station/river (e.g. river, station_name).

station_ID.title: station_ID
station_ID.description: Station/river ID value to filter in data_y (e.g. Drammenselva).

time_col_x.title: time_col_x
time_col_x.description: Time column name in data_x (e.g. datetime).

time_col_y.title: time_col_y
time_col_y.description: Time column name in data_y (e.g. Date or datetime).

csv_results.title: Joined CSV
csv_results.description: Link to the generated joined CSV file.
